tools.name: Start Here
tools.purpose: First-run guided entry point for nontechnical users and admins.
tools.output: Creates onboarding session and next-step checklist.

tools.name: Install Check
tools.purpose: Checks Python, OS, permissions, disk, and network readiness.

tools.name: Package Verifier
tools.purpose: Confirms package files, hashes, manifest, versions, and path lengths.

tools.name: Runtime Setup
tools.purpose: Creates local runtime folders and separates local state from source packages.

tools.name: Profile Preset Selector
tools.purpose: Selects home, school, library, makerspace, neighborhood, or emergency preset.

tools.name: Node Role Wizard
tools.purpose: Defines this machine as portal, storage, admin, gateway, client, peer, or hybrid.

tools.name: Local Identity Wizard
tools.purpose: Creates local identities, admin accounts, and recovery artifacts.

tools.name: Visibility Wizard
tools.purpose: Controls whether the user or node appears on the community web.

tools.name: Privacy Wizard
tools.purpose: Sets personal, household, student, staff, public-local, or organization privacy boundaries.

tools.name: Sharing Policy Builder
tools.purpose: Defines what may be shared, cached, copied, discovered, or published.

tools.name: Roles and Permissions Console
tools.purpose: Engineers roles, groups, approvals, admin powers, and command boundaries.

tools.name: Policy Simulator
tools.purpose: Tests who can see or do what before policy changes are applied.

tools.name: Device Discovery Tool
tools.purpose: Finds reachable devices, peers, services, storage nodes, and local interfaces.

tools.name: Add Device Wizard
tools.purpose: Adds router, PC, Pi, NAS, server, peer node, gateway, or storage device.

tools.name: Network Setup Assistant
tools.purpose: Guides LAN, Wi-Fi, ad hoc, static IP, hostname, and service-discovery setup.

tools.name: Mesh and Peer Link Assistant
tools.purpose: Adds peer links and verifies connectivity without assuming one transport.

tools.name: Gateway Boundary Tool
tools.purpose: Configures optional public-internet bridge, firewall, and exposure rules.

tools.name: Service Manager
tools.purpose: Enables local portal, file registry, directory, forum, wiki, search, and diagnostics services.

tools.name: File Registry Builder
tools.purpose: Scans selected folders and builds the local registry without publishing by default.

tools.name: Content Import Tool
tools.purpose: Imports files from flash drives or local folders and records provenance.

tools.name: Metadata Tagger
tools.purpose: Adds tags, descriptions, audience, owner, review status, and visibility flags.

tools.name: Review and Moderation Queue
tools.purpose: Supports review states, restrictions, block decisions, and accountability.

tools.name: Community Directory Publisher
tools.purpose: Publishes only approved public-local or peer-visible entries.

tools.name: Backup and Restore Tool
tools.purpose: Creates, verifies, and restores configuration, registry, and content backups.

tools.name: Sync and Replication Planner
tools.purpose: Controls which content is cached where and under what trust rules.

tools.name: Storage Steward Tool
tools.purpose: Shows capacity, cache health, replication state, and stale content.

tools.name: Diagnostics Dashboard
tools.purpose: Shows service health, network status, registry status, sync state, and errors.

tools.name: Audit Log Viewer
tools.purpose: Reviews changes, approvals, failures, policy changes, and exports.

tools.name: Security Hardening Checklist
tools.purpose: Guides passwords, firewall, local exposure, admin hygiene, and backups.

tools.name: Update and Package Installer
tools.purpose: Applies future CommNet packages while preserving runtime state.

tools.name: Export Support Bundle
tools.purpose: Creates a redacted diagnostic bundle for troubleshooting.

tools.name: Community Web Launcher
tools.purpose: Opens the local community portal for browsing, search, and local services.

tools.name: Admin Console Launcher
tools.purpose: Opens the powerful configuration platform for owners and admins.

tools.name: Help and Demo Mode
tools.purpose: Runs simulated walkthroughs without changing real settings.

tools.name: Emergency and Outage Mode Setup
tools.purpose: Configures local notices, emergency resources, and offline operation modes.

tools.name: Shortcut and Icon Manager
tools.purpose: Creates or repairs clickable launchers relative to the extracted package.
